channel.title: Posts on Prasanna's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Prasanna's blog

item.title: Tweetpost
item.description: I was first exposed to the Go language back in 2013 when I was working with Apache Cloudstack. At the time, I was using Mitchell Hashimoto’s Packer for spinning up images in AWS. However, a switch of jobs took me in a different direction and I never delved deeper. Now, I’ve finally found some time to experiment with Go again. Language Review I went back to review the language using the excellent golang website.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: A post shared by Prasanna Srivatsav (@vogxn) on Jan 24, 2017 at 6:26pm PST Greetings - I’m a software developer based in Bangalore, India. Many years ago I wrote blogs while going through college at the IIIT-H. As life took over and the dayjob paid the bills, I lost touch with blogging. Back then blogging was a big deal and I used to read the ilks of Meghalomania and Krish Ashok.
